caption: Driver looking down at a mobile device held in the right hand; eyes completely off the road.
notes: Classic textbook texting behavior. High confidence retrieval target.

caption: Driver has head turned back towards the rear seats, right arm extended backward.
notes: Posture severely compromises steering control. Flagged as critical.

caption: Driver is drinking from a large water bottle, obscuring the lower half of the face.
notes: Occlusion challenge for face detection models; rely on pose/hand tracking.

caption: Driver's left hand is near the ear holding a phone, gaze is fixed forward on the road.
notes: Visual tracking is maintained, but physical control is reduced to one hand.

caption: Clear daytime highway with solid white right lane marker and dashed yellow left marker.
Nighttime driving with heavy glare from oncoming vehicle headlights, obscuring the left lane boundary.
notes: Edge case. Model often struggles with false positives on light flares. RAG should advise relying on right-lane offset.

caption: Urban road with heavy shadow cast by trees over the lane markings.
notes: Contrast challenge. Edge detection methods typically fail here; segmentation is required.

caption: Heavy rain distorting the windshield view; lane lines are blurred by water droplets.
notes: Camera occlusion. RAG should issue a low-confidence warning for the segmentation mask.
